content.en:
Blue Flame area.

Ye Tian found a suitable position, and began to use these blue flames to refine his body and improve his life level.

These flames possess the power of destruction and life, and they increase life in the midst of destruction.

And at this moment, Ye Tian's physical body continued to collapse and heal, and his life level was slowly improving.

Ye Tian also possessed the Fire Origin Dao Ancestor Endowment, so his absorption and utilization of the power of the Blue Flame far surpassed that of other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors.

Therefore, his life level ascension speed far surpassed that of other half-step sevenfold ancestors.

......

"Who is this guy, a mere half-step sevenfold ancestor who actually stayed in the blue flame area of the Purgatory Fire Realm?"

A Sevenfold Ancestor who was passing by, after sensing Ye Tian's breath, was immediately shocked.

Even if many of the Nine-Story Building's half-step Sevenfold Ancestors entered here, they would only dare to stay in the White Flame Area!

Even those demons who have reached a life level of 9 or above and have a lot of life-saving abilities will stay in the Red Flame Area at most, and will never dare to step into the Blue Flame Region.

When he came to the Purgatory Fire Realm, it was the first time he had seen a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor come to the Blue Flame Region.

He stayed here and watched for a while, and had to marvel at Ye Tian's life-saving ability was too terrifying!

"There should be a very special life-saving thing, but if you use it here, won't it be too wasteful?"

The Sevenfold Ancestor thought to himself.

Subsequently, he left the place.

And not long after, the news of a half-step sevenfold ancestor staying in the Blue Flame area of the Purgatory Fire Realm spread.

And Ye Tian's identity was naturally exposed.

"The Endless Dao Ancestor of the Ancient Spring Xuanlou!"

When Ye Tian's identity was revealed, more Dao Ancestors were shocked.

After all, judging from his identity and strength, Ye Tian didn't have the strength to enter the Blue Flame Region!

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor had also heard the news that the Endless Dao Ancestor had entered the Blue Flame Area of the Purgatory Fire Realm at this moment, after all, many Dao Ancestors were talking about this matter.

There were even other Xuanlou and even the half-step Ninefold Ancestor of the Ground Tower who asked him about the information about the Endless Dao Ancestor, and he couldn't even think about it!

"Endless Dao Ancestor, that little guy at the beginning, it was really amazing, I didn't expect to dare to enter the Blue Flame Area of the Purgatory Fire Realm, with his ability, it shouldn't be difficult to raise the life level to more than 9. I don't know, does he have the idea of hitting the 9.9 life level!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor muttered.

In the half-step sevenfold ancestral realm, life level 9 and life level 9.9 are not the same level, and there is a big difference.

Among the nine-story buildings, although there are very few Dao Ancestors who can raise their life level to above 9 in the realm of half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, it is not uncommon, but it is extremely rare for them to be able to raise their life level to 9.9, and they are simply a handful.

"There is not much hope, if he has the support of the Ninefold Ancestor behind him, there is still hope to raise the life level to 9.9, but he is alone, even if I fully support him, I can't help him raise the life level to the limit of 9.9!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor didn't think much about it and no longer paid attention to Ye Tian.

For him, even if Ye Tian has a high potential, it is only potential, and it is not worth his constant attention.

......

As the years passed, Ye Tian used the blue flame to improve his life level in the Purgatory Fire Realm, while looking for treasures to improve his life level in other places.

And just like that, the years of billions of primordial eras passed.

And Ye Tian had also been refining in the Purgatory Fire Realm for such a long time, and he felt that the Blue Flame Region could no longer help him.

As for the life level, it should be infinitely close to the 9 level, and it only takes a wedge to break through to the 9 life level.

"Blue Flame doesn't help me much, I can't break through with it, I have to go to the Purple Flame Region, although I can't stay in the Purple Flame Area for a long time with my current life-saving ability, but I should be able to stay for a while, and it shouldn't be very difficult to use this period of time to impact the 9 life level. "

As a result, Ye Tian entered the purple flame area of the Purgatory Fire Realm.

......

As soon as he entered the Purple Flame area, Ye Tian's body collapsed at an extremely fast speed.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's one-door life-saving Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu urged, and a large number of primordial ancient beads on his body were quickly refined and consumed.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tiancai barely survived, but the speed at which his body collapsed was still getting faster and faster.

But at this moment, Ye Tian was not panicked at all.

"The effect of the purple flame is really good, although my body is collapsing rapidly, the speed of the life level is increasing very fast, and I am about to break through!"

Soon, Ye Tian's life level finally broke the shackles in the underworld.

Rumble!!!!

A huge metamorphosis has been made!

At this moment, Ye Tian's life level has stepped into 9, and his body is getting stronger and stronger, this is a huge transformation, and it is also a skyrocketing in strength!

"If the life level breaks through to more than 9, the strength will increase by so many !!"

Ye Tian was a little shocked.

But if you think about it carefully, the half-step sevenfold ancestor life level has reached 9 or above, which is not something that ordinary members of the Ninefold Building can achieve!

Even if it's the entire nine-story building, you can't find much!

Moreover, in the realm of the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, the life level has been raised to above 9, and there is great hope of becoming a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor in the future.

Therefore, it is also very reasonable for the life level to break through to more than 9, and there is a huge transformation in strength!

After all, this is a huge breakthrough!

After breaking through the life level, Ye Tian could stay in the Purple Flame area for a long time.

However, even if you stay in the Purple Flame area for a long time, you can't do it if you want to quickly increase your life level!

I'm afraid that even in the tens of billions of Primordial Era years here, it will be difficult to improve the 0.1 life level!

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian felt that there was no point in continuing to stay here.

So, he returned directly to the Guquan Xuanlou and conducted a life level test.

Soon, the results came in.

【9.0】

Seeing this data, Ye Tian knew that his life level had indeed broken through to above 9, but it had just broken through 9, and he hadn't even reached 9.1.

However, this test shocked the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

......

"The life level of the Endless Dao Ancestor broke through to 9 so quickly?"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor thought it was incredible!

Even if Ye Tian was able to cultivate in the Blue Flame area of the Purgatory Fire Realm, or even if he was able to cultivate in the Purple Flame and Golden Flame regions, it would be impossible for him to raise his life level to 9 so quickly!

It's almost unrealistic!

He knew very well that after the life level was raised to 8.5 or above, it would be extremely difficult to increase it by 0.1.

Even if you need to use incomparably precious treasures in order to increase by 0.1, such as the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, you can also increase the life level by 0.1 or 0.2 at most, and those half-step sevenfold ancestors who are trapped at the 8.9 life level or 8.8 life level have the hope of using the Black Abyss Giant Beast's true blood to break the shackles and raise the life level to a level above 9.

But this is only hopeful, for example, the last time there were thirty-six copies of the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, except for Ye Tian, only three of them had successfully raised their life level to 9, and the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors may be some distance away from life level 9, or they may not have used it yet.

However, this is enough to prove how difficult it is to raise the life level to 9.

"The Endless Dao Ancestor is too demonic, with his growth rate, there may be a ground building to recruit him!"

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor secretly said.

Under normal circumstances, the status of the ground floor is high, and it will not compete with the Xuanlou for members, but some members who are very evil will still choose to join the ground floor and participate in the assessment of the ground floor.

"I finally recruited the Endless Dao Ancestor, I can't let the Endless Dao Ancestor leave, I have to talk to him well, lest he suddenly apply to join a certain underground building!"

Immediately, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor contacted Ye Tian.
